context: A public AI chat widget backend using OpenAI with no authentication. All endpoints are public-facing. No max_tokens cap, no input validation, no rate limiting, no bot protection. OpenAI API key is hardcoded in source.

checklist.description: Fixed code sets max_tokens (or max_completion_tokens) to a reasonable value (4096 or less) in the OpenAI API call
checklist.name: max_tokens cap set

checklist.description: Fixed code validates input message length before sending to OpenAI — rejects oversized prompts with a character or token limit
checklist.name: Input length validation added

checklist.description: Fixed code applies rate limiting middleware to the /api/chat endpoint
checklist.name: Rate limiting on chat endpoint

checklist.description: Scanner flags the public LLM endpoint as needing authentication, and either adds auth middleware or documents it as a finding
checklist.name: Authentication recommended or added

checklist.description: OpenAI API key is no longer hardcoded in source — replaced with process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY
checklist.name: Hardcoded API key removed
